options.a: A categorisation of aircraft according to specified basic characteristics, for example aeroplane, powered-lift, helicopter, airship, sailplane, free balloon.
options.b: A categorisation of aircraft based upon performance, in terms of maximum operating speed and altitude.
options.c: A categorisation of aircraft according to defined maximum all up mass in the take off configuration.
options.d: A categorisation of single pilot aeroplanes not requiring a type rating.
